description: Creates a spending limit for a specified quantum device. Spending limits help you control costs by setting maximum amounts that can be spent on quantum computing tasks within a specified time period.

TimePeriod.description: Defines a time range for spending limits, specifying when the limit is active.

StartAt.description: The start date and time for the spending limit period, in ISO 8601 format.

EndAt.description: The end date and time for the spending limit period, in ISO 8601 format.

Tag.description: A key-value pair to associate with a resource.

Key.description: The key name of the tag.

SpendingLimitArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the spending limit.

DeviceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the quantum device to apply the spending limit to.

SpendingLimit.description: The maximum amount that can be spent on the specified device, in USD.

QueuedSpend.description: The amount currently queued for spending on the device, in USD.

TotalSpend.description: The total amount spent on the device so far during the current time period, in USD.

CreatedAt.description: The date and time when the spending limit was created, in ISO 8601 format.

UpdatedAt.description: The date and time when the spending limit was last modified, in ISO 8601 format.

Tags.description: The tags to apply to the spending limit.
